summary.summary: This change updates Trio's telemetry payload and related build metadata capture: (1) the build-info capture script was changed to force the POSIX/C locale when writing com-trio-build-date to Info.plist (commit:4b2f1741e9968be94f0eceaaae4ba71b6bb44f32; file:4c4fda0f1647; diff:7106ee2c0b71). (2) Telemetry now parses the build-date into an actual Date and emits a date-only string in YYYY-MM-DD (UTC) form using an en_US_POSIX DateFormatter (commit:1f0dcbedc48db8f80323cc7a233d6f65b5985c19; file:5f76603ecb5f; diff:7106ee2c0b71). (3) The telemetry payload gains locale and timeZone fields populated from Locale.current.identifier and TimeZone.current.identifier (commit:c17f7bfabd4e7e6460606c8388903c5320567195; file:5f76603ecb5f; diff:7106ee2c0b71). (4) The telemetry app name is exposed as a hardcoded telemetryAppName = "Trio" and emitted as appName in the payload (commits:925cb817654c2f6f2335d1d3a9416314e9d9a12b and 61e5ea46197f16823f8b3fa4ce2ddaf5abf65101; file:5f76603ecb5f; diff:7106ee2c0b71). (5) The repository PRIVACY_POLICY.md was updated to document the new locale/timeZone telemetry fields and the policy last-updated date (commit:cea7db10a97787cc595fcee7a9d83dad6d8df2b4; file:0ac7045a8265; diff:7106ee2c0b71). The pull request and merge commit are pr:gordolio/Trio#1172 and pr:nightscout/Trio#1172 / commit:00dd3138c987fe96927d5a00a8b28662ecff3747.
summary.userFacingImpact: The changes affect telemetry and build-metadata only: build-date values written at build time are now produced in a POSIX/C locale and telemetry will report buildDate as YYYY-MM-DD (UTC), plus locale, timeZone, and appName are added to the telemetry payload (see commits:4b2f1741e9968be94f0eceaaae4ba71b6bb44f32; 1f0dcbedc48db8f80323cc7a233d6f65b5985c19; c17f7bfabd4e7e6460606c8388903c5320567195; 61e5ea46197f16823f8b3fa4ce2ddaf5abf65101). No code paths beyond telemetry/build-metadata capture are modified in the supplied diffs; evidence is insufficient to assert any other runtime or safety impact without a human review of the broader codebase and deployment configuration (see file:5f76603ecb5f; file:4c4fda0f1647; file:0ac7045a8265).
